s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 2 FUEL TANK CUSHION

s2.ptxt: Install 7 new No. 2 fuel tank cushions to the fuel tank.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FUEL MAIN TUBE SUPPORT

s2.ptxt: Install the fuel main tube support with the bolt.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FUEL PUMP TUBE SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the fuel pump tube to the fuel main tube support.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FUEL TANK VENT HOSE

s2.ptxt: Install the fuel tank vent hose.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FUEL TANK ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the 4 clip nuts (Except SE Grade).
Install the 4 clip nuts (for SE Grade).
Install the 2 fuel tank bands with the 2 pins.
Set the fuel tank assembly onto the transmission jack.
Raise the transmission jack so that the fuel tank vent hose can be connected. (*1)

atten3.ptxt: Slowly raise the jack to prevent the fuel tank assembly from dropping.

s2.ptxt: Connect the fuel tank inlet pipe with the fuel filter pipe clamp. (*2)
Tighten the 2 set bolts of the fuel tank bands. (*3)
Connect the No. 1 fuel tube.

s3.ptxt: Push the fuel tube connector into the pipe until the fuel tube connector makes a "click" sound.

item.ptxt: Before connecting the tube, make sure that it is not damaged. Make sure that there is no dirt present on any part of the connector.
After connecting the connector, check if the fuel tube connector and the pipe are securely connected by pulling on them.

s2.ptxt: Connect the fuel pump tube.

s3.ptxt: Push the fuel connector into the pipe and push up the retainer so that the claws engage.

item.ptxt: Before connecting the tube, make sure that it is not damaged. Make sure that there is no dirt present on any part of the connector.
After connecting the connector, check if the fuel tube connector and the pipe are securely connected by pulling on them.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FUEL TANK PROTECTOR LOWER CENTER

s2.ptxt: Install the 4 bolts and fuel tank protector (Except SE Grade).
Install the fuel tank protector with the 4 bolts and 2 clips (for SE Grade).

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR STABILIZER BAR NO. 1 BRACKET

s2.ptxt: Install the 2 rear stabilizer bar No. 1 brackets with the 4 bolts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 3 PARKING BRAKE CABLE ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the No. 3 parking brake cable assembly with the bolt and nut.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 2 PARKING BRAKE CABLE ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the No. 2 parking brake cable assembly with the bolt and nut.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CENTER EXHAUST PIPE ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install a new gasket onto the front exhaust pipe.
Install the center exhaust pipe assembly with the 2 bolts and 2 nuts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FUEL SUCTION TUBE ASSEMBLY WITH PUMP AND GAUGE

s2.ptxt: Install a new gasket to the fuel suction tube.
Install the fuel suction tube.

item.ptxt: Do not damage the fuel pump filter.
Be careful that the arm of the sender gauge does not bend.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FUEL TANK VENT TUBE SET PLATE

s2.ptxt: Align the mark of the set plate with the fuel suction tube.
Install the set plate with the 8 bolts.

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT FUEL PUMP TUBE SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the fuel pump tube with the tube joint clip.

item.ptxt: Check that there are no scratches or foreign objects on the connecting part.
Check that the fuel tube joint is inserted securely.
Check that the tube joint clip is correctly located on the collar of the fuel tube joint.
After installing the tube joint clip, check that the fuel tube joint is pulled out of position.

s-1.ptxt: ADD FUEL
CONNECT CABLE TO NEGATIVE BATTERY TERMINAL
CHECK FOR FUEL LEAKS

s2.ptxt: Check fuel pump operation.

s3.ptxt: Connect the intelligent tester to the DLC3.
Turn the ignition switch on (IG) and push the intelligent tester main switch on.
Select the following menu items: DIAGNOSIS / ENHANCED OBD II / ACTIVE TEST / FUEL PUMP / SPD.

Check for pressure in the fuel inlet tube from the fuel line. Check that sound of fuel flowing in the fuel tank can be heard. If no sound can be heard, check the integration relay, fuel pump, ECM and wiring connector.

s2.ptxt: Check for fuel leaks.

s3.ptxt: Check that there are no fuel leaks anywhere on the system after performing maintenance. If there is a fuel leak, repair or replace parts as necessary.

s2.ptxt: Turn the ignition switch off.
Disconnect the intelligent tester from the DLC3.

s-1.ptxt: CHECK FOR EXHAUST GAS LEAKS
INSTALL REAR FLOOR SERVICE HOLE COVER
INSTALL REAR SEAT CUSHION ASSEMBLY (for Fixed Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Attach the 2 front hooks of the seat cushion to the vehicle body.
Confirm that the seat cushion is firmly installed.

atten3.ptxt: When installing the seat cushion, make sure the seat belt buckle is not under the seat cushion.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEAT CUSHION ASSEMBLY (for Fold Down Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Attach the front hooks of the bench type rear seat cushion assembly to the vehicle body.
Confirm that the seat cushion is firmly installed.

atten3.ptxt: When installing the bench type rear seat cushion assembly, make sure that the seat belt buckle is not under the bench type rear seat cushion assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEAT CUSHION ASSEMBLY (for Reclining Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Attach the front hooks of the bench type rear seat cushion assembly to the vehicle body.
Confirm that the seat cushion is firmly installed.

atten3.ptxt: When installing the bench type rear seat cushion assembly, make sure that the seat belt buckle is not under the bench type rear seat cushion assembly.
